description: A designed graphic styled as a Bloomberg news article screenshot/card. At the top is the bold black 'Bloomberg' wordmark, beneath which a large black serif headline reads: 'Trump to Add New $100,000 Fee for H-1B Visas in Latest Crackdown.' A byline 'By Josh Wingrove and Hadriana Lowenkron' and a timestamp 'September 19, 2025 1:58pm' follow, along with a row of circular social-share icons (Facebook, X, LinkedIn, email, link). The lower half is a tight color photograph of President Trump in a dark navy suit with a red tie and American-flag lapel pin, looking sternly forward; behind him is a blurred gilded/ornate interior (Mar-a-Lago style gold molding) with an out-of-focus American flag. The card repackages a mainstream news headline to promote and credit the administration's H-1B visa fee crackdown. Propaganda technique: appeal to authority by citing an establishment outlet (Bloomberg) to validate a restrictive immigration policy. Target audience is supporters of 'America First' labor and immigration policy who want fewer foreign-worker visas.
notable_text: Bloomberg — Trump to Add New $100,000 Fee for H-1B Visas in Latest Crackdown.
